choose-three: Choose any three story stones. Every group has its own story!
stones-ready: Your three stones are ready. Tap the arrow to begin!
another-story: Choose three new stones for another story!
story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-begi: In Amber Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped across the mossy green, wishing for one thing: friends to share a picnic on the soft grass.
story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-comp: Orange Cat padded over with a picnic basket, but a gust tumbled all the acorn muffins rolling down the winding, bumpy path!
story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-reso: White Cat pounced in, and together Friendly Dragon puffed warm air, Orange Cat scooped, White Cat caught, and they munched every muffin, giggling.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--orange-c: In Bluebell Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon warmed the acorn-roof cottages with a puff of cozy breath. "Today," he beamed, "let's have a picnic on the green!"
Orange Cat trotted up with a basket of muffins. "Oh no," she mewed, "the green is bare and bumpy — nowhere soft to sit!"
Friendly Monster bounded over with armfuls of mossy blankets. Dragon smoothed them, Cat set out muffins, and all three cheered on the softest, greenest picnic ever!
story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-beginning: In Bubble Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one thing: a big picnic on the wide, grassy village green.
story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-complicati: Then Orange Cat padded up, tail drooping. "Oh no! The picnic blanket blew high into the tall acorn tree, and I can't reach it!"
story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-resolution: Meadow Owl swooped down, lifted the blanket in her soft wings, and laid it on the green. Friendly Dragon, Orange Cat, and Meadow Owl cheered and shared warm berry buns together!
story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-begi: In Cinnamon Acorn Village, on the mossy green, Friendly Dragon puffed warm little smoke rings and wished someone would come play in the morning sun.
story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-comp: Then Orange Cat trotted up the winding path, but her paws were cold and her tummy rumbled loud as a drum. "I'm so hungry!" she mewed.
story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-reso: Friendly Dragon spotted a golden Croissant tucked in the acorn roof; it sparkled and unfolded, and the two friends shared warm buttery bites, giggling on the green.
story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-beginning: In Dandelion Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped across the mossy green, wishing for a friend to play with beneath the acorn-roof cottages.
story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-complicat: Then Orange Cat padded up, but her red kite string had tangled tight around a wobbly fence, and she couldn't pull it free.
story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-resolutio: Nearby, a Magic Rose sparkled and unfolded its petals, gently loosening the knot, and the two new friends flew the kite high, laughing together.
story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-beg: In Dewdrop Acorn Village, a Friendly Dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for a warm little bonfire to toast acorns on the empty green.
story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-com: Just then an Orange Cat padded over, tail drooping. "My yarn ball rolled under the fence and I can't reach it," she mewed sadly.
story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-res: Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rock, which sparkled and unfolded into a tiny helping hand to fetch the yarn, then glowed warm for toasty acorns. Everyone cheered!
story-dragon--orange-cat--treasure-chest: In Firefly Acorn Village, a Friendly Dragon skipped down the mossy path, puffing tiny warm clouds and wishing for one game to play on the big empty green.
Then Orange Cat padded over, tail curled sadly. "I lost my bouncy ball in the tall grass," she mewed, and the two friends began to search.
Their paws bumped a Treasure Chest that sparkled and popped open, spilling a hundred bouncy balls, and Friendly Dragon and Orange Cat played on the green till starlight.
story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-beg: In Giggling Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one warm friend to play with on the big green.
story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-com: Then Orange Cat crept out from an acorn-roof cottage, but the little door swung shut and clicked, locking her favorite red ball inside.
story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-res: Friendly Dragon spotted a Golden Key sparkling in the moss; it clicked, the door popped open, and both friends rolled the red ball across the green, giggling.
story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-begi: In Honey Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon puffed warm little clouds over the mossy fences and wished the empty green could be a happy place to play.
story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-comp: Then Orange Cat trotted up, tail drooping. "I want to play too," she mewed, "but the green is so bare and there is nothing here at all."
story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-reso: Just then a Magic Bag sparkled in the grass, unfolding swings, a slide, and bright balloons. Friendly Dragon and Orange Cat cheered and played all afternoon.
story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-b: In Lavender Acorn Village, a Friendly Dragon skipped along the mossy path, wishing someone would play tag with him on the big empty green.
story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-c: Then Orange Cat popped from an acorn-roof cottage, but her yarn ball had rolled up the tallest fence, far too high to reach.
story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-r: Dragon huffed a warm breath and a Wishing Star floated up, unfolding sparkly steps that nudged the yarn down, so all three played tag till bedtime.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--white-ca: In Moonbeam Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped down the mossy path, wishing for a game to play on the big empty green.
Then White Cat padded up with a bright red ball, but it rolled behind the tall fence where nobody could reach.
Friendly Monster stretched long arms over the fence, Friendly Dragon flew, and White Cat caught the ball — now all three could play together, cheering and laughing!
story-dragon--owl--white-cat-beginning: On the mossy green of Peppermint Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon puffed warm little smoke-rings and wished for one perfect thing: a cozy campfire to toast acorn muffins.
story-dragon--owl--white-cat-complicatio: Then White Cat padded up, tail twitching. "Oh no," she mewed, "the wind keeps puffing your fire out, and our muffins are still cold!"
story-dragon--owl--white-cat-resolution: Meadow Owl swooped down and spread her wide soft wings to block the wind, Friendly Dragon huffed a cozy flame, and all three cheered over warm, toasty muffins!
story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-begin: In Puddle Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped down the mossy path, warm and glowing, wishing for one small friend to share the sunny green.
story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-compl: Just then White Cat crept out, shivering and cold from the shady acorn cottages, so the two friends wondered how to make her cozy and warm.
story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-resol: Friendly Dragon breathed a soft puff, and a buttery Croissant unfolded, sparkling and toasty warm; White Cat curled up on it, purring across the happy green.
story-dragon--rose--white-cat-beginning: In Rainbow Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon puffed warm little clouds over the green and wished for a cozy party under the acorn-roof cottages.
story-dragon--rose--white-cat-complicati: Then White Cat padded up, shivering. "The green is chilly and bare," she mewed. Friendly Dragon's tiny flames just couldn't warm the whole village.
story-dragon--rose--white-cat-resolution: By the mossy fence they found a Magic Rose. It sparkled and unfolded, spilling warm golden light across the green, and all three danced together, cozy and giggling.
story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-begi: In Singing Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one thing: a big, bouncy party on the empty village green.
story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-comp: Then White Cat padded up, tail drooping. "But the green is so plain," she mewed, "and we have no lights and no music for a party!"
story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-reso: Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rock in the moss; it sparkled, unfolded, and spilled twinkling lanterns and jingly bells everywhere. Together they danced all night!
story-dragon--treasure-chest--white-cat-: In Stardust Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped along a mossy path, hoping to share warm cocoa with everyone on the wide, empty village green.
Then White Cat trotted up, ears drooping. "There are no cups, and no chairs to sit on!" she mewed. Friendly Dragon scratched his snout.
Behind a fence, White Cat spotted a sparkling Treasure Chest. It clicked open and unfolded into cozy cups and little chairs — so everyone sipped cocoa together, giggling under the stars.
story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-begi: In Sunflower Acorn Village, a friendly Dragon hummed on the mossy green, wishing everyone would come out to play under the warm morning sun.
story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-comp: Then White Cat crept up, tail low. "The village hall is locked," she mewed, "and the toys are all stuck inside!"
story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-reso: Dragon spotted a Golden Key sparkling in the grass. It clicked, the door swung wide, and everyone tumbled out to play, giggling in the sun!
story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-begin: On the green in Tickle Acorn Village, a Friendly Dragon huffed warm little puffs. "I wish to warm every cold nose today!" he said with a smile.
story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-compl: Then White Cat padded up, shivering. "My mittens blew away down the mossy path," she mewed, and her paws were far too cold to catch them.
story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-resol: Under an acorn roof, a Magic Bag sparkled and unfolded two soft red mittens. Dragon puffed them cozy-warm, White Cat wiggled her paws, and everyone cheered!
story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-be: In Twinkle Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon puffed warm little clouds over the mossy fences, wishing someone would come play on the big empty green.
story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-co: Soft White Cat padded up, but the green was too dark now for games, and her whiskers drooped. "How will we see to play?" she mewed.
story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-re: Friendly Dragon spotted a Wishing Star nestled in the acorn roof; White Cat batted it free, and it unfolded, sparkling silver light so all three danced across the glowing green.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-begi: In Velvet Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped across the mossy green, puffing tiny warm smoke rings and wishing everyone would come play a game together.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-comp: Then round Friendly Monster bounced up with a big soft ball, but it rolled away and got stuck high on an acorn roof!
story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-reso: Wise Meadow Owl swooped down, nudged the ball to Friendly Dragon's puff of smoke, and it floated back to Friendly Monster. Everyone cheered and played!
story-croissant--dragon--friendly-monste: In the sunny courtyard of Amber Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon flapped down by the berry-shaped ovens, wishing warmly for one perfect, puffy morning pastry.
Then Friendly Monster tiptoed over the cobbles and gasped, "Oh no, the oven flame flickered out, and the dough is still cold and flat!"
Dragon breathed a gentle golden puff, the oven glowed, and a Croissant sparkled and unfolded into buttery layers. Everyone shared warm crumbs, giggling under the floury bunting.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-beg: In the Bluebell Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon flapped down to the cobbled courtyard, sniffing the floury bunting. "I would love to bake one warm berry bun!" he said.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-com: Friendly Monster peeked from behind a berry-shaped oven. "Oh no," she giggled, "the oven is cold, and I can't find a single spark to light it!"
story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-res: Then they spotted a Magic Rose on the windowsill. It unfolded and sparkled, and its glow woke the oven warm — soon Dragon and Monster shared the puffiest berry bun, cheering.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--magic-ro: At Bubble Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with tiny puffs and wished for the fluffiest cloudberry buns in all the woods.
Then Friendly Monster tiptoed across the cobbles. "Oh no," he whispered, "my dough won't rise, and it's flat as a floury pancake!"
In the courtyard they spotted a Magic Rock. It sparkled, unfolded, and puffed the dough up big and round, and everyone cheered with warm, bouncy buns!
story-dragon--friendly-monster--treasure: In the Cinnamon Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon huffed warm puffs to light the berry ovens. "Today," he beamed, "I will bake the tallest cinnamon bun ever!"
Then Friendly Monster tumbled in with the flour and gasped, "Oh no, our recipe blew away in the breeze!" The bunting flapped, and the two friends frowned.
On the cobbles, a Treasure Chest sparkled and popped open, unfolding the lost recipe like a ribbon. Together they baked the tallest, warmest bun, and everyone cheered!
story-dragon--friendly-monster--golden-k: In the woodland Dandelion Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect, golden loaf to share.
Friendly Monster tiptoed across the cobbles, sniffing happily, but the oven door was stuck fast and the loaf inside stayed hidden in the dark.
Under the floury bunting, Golden Key sparkled, unfolded, and clicked the door wide open, and the three friends cheered over warm, buttery bread together.
story-dragon--friendly-monster--magic-ba: In the Dewdrop Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff. "Today," she smiled, "I'll bake a giant cloudberry tart!"
Friendly Monster hurried across the cobbles. "Oh no," he said, "we have no flour left, and the bunting is drooping!"
Then Friendly Monster spotted a Magic Bag by the oven. It sparkled, unfolded, and poured out sweet flour, so all three baked the tart and cheered!
story-dragon--friendly-monster--wishing-: In the cobbled courtyard of Firefly Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry ovens with a puff of breath. "Let's bake fluffy cloudberry buns!" he cheered.
Friendly Monster hurried in to help, but oh! The flour bin was empty, and the shelf sat far too high to reach.
Then Friendly Monster spotted a Wishing Star tucked in the bunting. It sparkled and unfolded into a soft floury ladder, and together they baked warm buns for everyone!
story-croissant--dragon--owl-beginning: In the Giggling Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry ovens with a soft puff and hummed, wishing for one perfect pastry to share.
story-croissant--dragon--owl-complicatio: Then Meadow Owl swooped down to help, but the dough sat cold and flat, too sleepy to rise on the floury table.
story-croissant--dragon--owl-resolution: Dragon breathed gentle warmth, Owl fluffed the top, and a golden Croissant unfolded, sparkling and puffy, so all three cheered and shared the flaky treat.
story-dragon--owl--rose-beginning: In the cobbled courtyard of Honey Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for the perfect flour to bake his cloudberry buns.
story-dragon--owl--rose-complication: Meadow Owl swooped down, flapping fast — "Oh no, the wind blew all the floury bunting into a big tangled knot above the ovens!"
story-dragon--owl--rose-resolution: Then a Magic Rose sparkled on the courtyard floor and unfolded, gently lifting the bunting straight, so Dragon and Owl cheered and shared warm buns together.
story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-beginning: In the woodland bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry ovens with a soft huff and wished for one perfect, puffy cloudberry tart to share.
story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-complicati: Meadow Owl swooped down over the cobbles. "Oh no," she hooted, "your oven flame is too tiny to bake the tart!"
story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-resolution: Together they found a sparkly Magic Rock, which unfolded and glowed warm and gold. The oven puffed the tart big, and everyone cheered!
story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-beginn: In the sunny courtyard of Moonbeam Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect cloudberry pie.
story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-compli: Down swooped Meadow Owl, hooting, "Oh no, the flour tin is empty!" The floury bunting fluttered as the two friends wondered what to sprinkle on top.
story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-resolu: Then they spotted a sparkling Treasure Chest on the cobbles; it opened and unfolded, spilling silvery sugar. Dragon dusted the pie, Owl cheered, and everyone tasted sweet joy.
story-dragon--golden-key--owl-beginning: In the woodland bakery, Friendly Dragon puffed warm breath on the berry-shaped ovens, humming as he waited for his blueberry muffins to bake golden.
story-dragon--golden-key--owl-complicati: Meadow Owl swooped down onto the cobbles. "The oven door is stuck tight!" she hooted, and the muffins could not come out.
story-dragon--golden-key--owl-resolution: Then Meadow Owl spotted a Golden Key sparkling in the flour. It fit the little door, clicked, and swung open — warm muffins for everyone!
story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-beginning: In the woodland courtyard, Friendly Dragon puffed warm breath on the berry ovens, humming and wishing for one perfect batch of blueberry buns.
story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-complicatio: Then Meadow Owl swooped down, flapping worried wings, because the floury bunting had tangled and the buns were still too cold to bake.
story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-resolution: On the cobbles they found a Magic Bag that sparkled and unfolded, spilling out cozy oven-mitts; Dragon puffed, Owl fanned, and warm buns popped up, golden and sweet!
story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-beginnin: In the Rainbow Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a gentle puff and wished for one perfect, sky-high cloudberry cake.
story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-complica: Meadow Owl swooped down over the cobbles, hooting softly, "Oh no! The oven's gone cold, and our cake is still squishy in the middle!"
story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-resoluti: Then Owl spotted a Wishing Star tucked in the bunting; it sparkled and unfolded warm golden light, baking the cake tall and sweet. Everyone cheered!
story-croissant--dragon--rose-beginning: In the Singing Cloudberry Bakery, a Friendly Dragon landed on the cobbles, sniffed the warm ovens, and wished out loud for one soft, buttery treat.
story-croissant--dragon--rose-complicati: Then a golden Croissant popped from a berry-shaped oven, but it was still too hot to hold, and everyone said "ouch!"
story-croissant--dragon--rose-resolution: A Magic Rose sparkled open, breathing cool petal-air until the Croissant was just right, and the Friendly Dragon shared the first happy bite.
story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-begi: In the Stardust Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect, buttery treat to share.
story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-comp: Out popped a golden Croissant, sparkling with sugar — but it puffed up too big and wobbled, teetering on the edge of the floury table!
story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-reso: Friendly Dragon rolled over a smooth Magic Rock; it glowed and gently balanced the Croissant, and everyone shared warm, flaky bites in the sunny courtyard.
story-croissant--dragon--treasure-chest-: In the Sunflower Cloudberry Bakery, a Friendly Dragon landed softly on the cobbles and wished, with a warm little puff, to bake the fluffiest breakfast ever.
He tried to warm one buttery Croissant in a berry oven, but the Croissant sparkled and unfolded bigger and bigger, until it was too puffy to fit anywhere.
Then a Treasure Chest by the bunting popped open, just the right size, and the Friendly Dragon tucked the giant Croissant inside, warm and golden, for everyone to share.
story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-begi: In the woodland bakery, Friendly Dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and hummed, "Today I will bake the fluffiest treat of all!"
story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-comp: But the oven door stuck fast, and inside a shiny Croissant sparkled and wiggled, wanting to hop out and cool on the sunny courtyard stones.
story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-reso: Then Friendly Dragon spotted a Golden Key glinting in the flour; it clicked, the door swung wide, and out popped the warm Croissant. "Hooray!"
story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-begin: In the Twinkle Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon landed softly on the cobbles and puffed a warm breath into the berry-shaped ovens. "Let's bake buns for everyone!" he cheered.
story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-compl: But the last Croissant on the tray sparkled, unfolded like tiny wings, and floated up, up, tangling itself high in the floury bunting.
story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-resol: Friendly Dragon opened his Magic Bag, and out puffed a soft cloud ladder that lifted the Croissant down. Everyone munched warm buns and giggled together.
story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-be: In the cobbled courtyard of Velvet Cloudberry Bakery, Friendly Dragon fluttered down and puffed a warm breath. "I would love to bake one perfect pastry today!" he grinned.
story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-co: Inside a berry-shaped oven he found one lonely Croissant, but it was flat and floppy, too soft to puff up on its own.
story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-re: Then a Wishing Star drifted down, sparkling over the Croissant until it curled golden and warm. Friendly Dragon cheered and shared it under the floury bunting.
story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-beginning: At Amber Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hopped onto a lily-pad dock and waved. "I wish to sail a feather-boat today!" she said with a happy puff.
story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-complicat: But the boats sat still, with no wind to push them. Then Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rose sparkling on the quay, its petals gently unfolding.
story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-resolutio: The Magic Rose breathed a soft breeze, and a glowing Magic Rock lifted the sails high. Off floated Friendly Dragon, laughing across the shiny water!
story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-begin: At sunny Bluebell Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hopped onto a lily-pad dock and puffed tiny warm sparks, wishing for a game to play.
story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-compl: Then Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rose glowing on a feather-boat, but the boat had drifted too far to reach across the quiet water.
story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-resol: Friendly Dragon breathed a gentle breeze, the Magic Rose unfolded into a bridge of petals, and there sat a Treasure Chest full of shiny bells to ring together!
story-dragon--golden-key--rose-beginning: Morning shone on Bubble Featherboat Harbour, and Friendly Dragon hummed on the lily-pad dock, wishing for one sunny sail in his little feather-boat.
story-dragon--golden-key--rose-complicat: But the boat was tied with a tight, knotty rope! Then Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rose glowing pink in the painted boathouse window.
story-dragon--golden-key--rose-resolutio: The Magic Rose unfolded to show a shiny Golden Key, which slipped free the knot. Off sailed Friendly Dragon across the quay, laughing with joy!
story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-beginning: At Cinnamon Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hopped onto a lily-pad dock, wings pink in the sunshine, wishing for one perfect flower to gift the little boats.
story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-complicati: Then a Magic Rose sparkled up between two feather-boats, but it grew far out on the water, too far for Dragon's paws to reach.
story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-resolution: Dragon opened a Magic Bag, which unfolded a long ribbon; the ribbon looped the Magic Rose and pulled it close, and everyone cheered across the quay.
story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-beginni: At Dandelion Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hummed on the lily-pad dock, wishing to sail his little feather boat out past the painted boathouses.
story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-complic: But the air was still, and his feather sail hung floppy. Then he spotted a Magic Rose tucked in the reeds, its petals glowing soft pink.
story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-resolut: The Magic Rose unfolded and out popped a Wishing Star that sparkled and blew a gentle breeze. The feather sail puffed full, and Friendly Dragon glided off, giggling across the quay.
story-dragon--magic-rock--treasure-chest: At Dewdrop Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hummed on the lily-pad dock, wishing for one perfect ride in the little feather-shaped boats.
But every feather boat had drifted far out on the quiet water, too far to reach — until a Magic Rock on the shore began to glow warm and pink.
Friendly Dragon tapped the glowing Magic Rock, and a Treasure Chest sprang open, unrolling a bright ribbon that gently towed all the feather boats home for a happy ride.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-beg: At Firefly Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon landed on a lily-pad dock with a happy puff of smoke, wishing to take one little feather-boat out for a sail.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-com: But every feather-boat was tied with a knotted rope! Then Friendly Dragon spotted a Magic Rock on the quay, sparkling and slowly unfolding like a flower.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-res: Inside the Magic Rock lay a shiny Golden Key that untied every knot at one warm touch, and Friendly Dragon sailed off across the harbour, giggling.
story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-begi: At Giggling Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon landed on a lily-pad dock and wished for one perfect ride in the softest feather boat.
story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-comp: But the little feather boat had no oars, so it just spun in slow circles. Then Friendly Dragon spotted a shiny Magic Rock glowing on the quay.
story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-reso: The Magic Rock sparkled open into a Magic Bag full of tiny paddles, and together they scooped the water and sailed off giggling across the harbour.
story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-b: At Honey Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hopped onto a lily-pad dock and puffed warm little clouds. "I want to sail a feather-boat today!" she cheered.
story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-c: But every feather-boat drifted just out of reach on the wide quay. Then Dragon spotted a Magic Rock that sparkled and slowly unfolded into a smooth stone bridge.
story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-r: Dragon tiptoed across, and a Wishing Star floated up, gently nudging a boat to her paws. Together they glided off, giggling across the shining water.
story-dragon--golden-key--treasure-chest: At Lavender Featherboat Harbour, a Friendly Dragon landed softly on a lily-pad dock and wished for a warm cake to share with all the boats.
Then his tail bumped a Treasure Chest hidden under a feather-boat, and it sparkled and rattled, but its little lid stayed shut tight.
A shiny Golden Key floated up from the water, and together they turned it, click! The chest sprang open, spilling warm cakes across the sunny quay.
story-dragon--magic-bag--treasure-chest-: At Moonbeam Featherboat Harbour, a Friendly Dragon landed on a lily-pad dock with a happy puff of warm smoke. "I want to give the boats a gift!" he said.
Under a painted boathouse he found a Treasure Chest, but it sparkled and popped open with too many shiny shells to carry. "Oh, they keep spilling!" he laughed.
Then a Magic Bag unfolded beside him, and the Dragon scooped every shell inside. Together they hung one shiny shell on each feather-boat, and the whole quay glowed.
story-dragon--treasure-chest--wishing-st: At Peppermint Featherboat Harbour, a Friendly Dragon puffed warm little clouds over the lily-pad docks and wished for someone to sail the feather-boats with.
On the quay, Friendly Dragon found a sparkly Treasure Chest, but its lid was stuck tight and would not open, no matter how gently he pushed.
A Wishing Star twinkled down, and Friendly Dragon made a wish; the Treasure Chest clicked open, spilling glowing pearls that lit up the whole harbour with giggles.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-begi: At Puddle Featherboat Harbour, a Friendly Dragon landed on a lily-pad dock with a happy hum. "I want to take my little boat sailing today!" she said.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-comp: But her feather-boat was locked tight to the quay! Then something twinkled between two painted boathouses — a shiny Golden Key, waiting to be found.
story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-reso: The Golden Key clicked the boat free, and out popped a Magic Bag full of soft sails and snacks. Dragon sailed off giggling across the sparkly water!
story-dragon--golden-key--wishing-star-b: At Rainbow Featherboat Harbour, Friendly Dragon hopped onto a lily-pad dock and puffed, "Today I want to sail my little red featherboat!"
story-dragon--golden-key--wishing-star-c: But the boathouse was locked tight. Then Dragon spotted a Golden Key glinting in the reeds, but its keyhole was hidden somewhere in the dark.
story-dragon--golden-key--wishing-star-r: A Wishing Star floated down and sparkled bright, showing the keyhole! The Golden Key clicked, the boathouse swung open, and Dragon sailed off, cheering.
